export function expandPath(path: string): string {
  const home = homedir();

  return path
    .replace(/^\$HOME(?=\/|$)/, home)
    .replace(/^\$\{HOME\}(?=\/|$)/, home)
    .replace(/^~(?=\/|$)/, home);
}
